title: The Fear of Mediocrity
summary: Turning 22 in my fourth year at UCSD, I reflect on losing the intense drive I once had, how my baseline shifted toward 'normal,' and what it takes to fear mediocrity again.

title: The Decline of the Cognitive Unit
summary: We are, perhaps, the last generation for whom thinking feels like an exclusively human act. A reflection on cognitive offloading, and the reality of being a student in 2026.
